character_dossiers.name: Silver
character_dossiers.biography: Escaped the island via shore boat, stole treasure, and disappeared.

character_dossiers.name: the maroon
character_dossiers.biography: Conspired to help Silver escape to save the crew's lives.

character_dossiers.name: the sea-cook
character_dossiers.biography: Stole a sack of coin and fled with it.

character_dossiers.name: Captain Smollett
character_dossiers.biography: Retired from the sea after the events.

character_dossiers.name: Gray
character_dossiers.biography: Saved his money, studied medicine, and became a shipmate and owner.

character_dossiers.name: Ben Gunn
character_dossiers.biography: Received a thousand pounds, spent it quickly, and now lives in a lodge.

character_dossiers.name: Captain Flint
character_dossiers.biography: Buried the treasure and is referenced as a feared figure.

character_dossiers.name: Mr. Blandly
character_dossiers.biography: Began planning to fit out his consort ship.
